summary: Board layout persistence feature fully tested and working. Admin can save column_order and hidden_columns globally via PUT /api/config/board-layout/{board_name}. Layout persists after page reload. Non-admin users see the same layout but cannot modify (403). All 12 backend tests and 8 frontend tests passed.
features_tested: Backend: GET /api/config/board-layout/{board} requires auth - PASS (401 without auth)
Backend: GET /api/config/board-layout/{board} returns layout for authenticated user - PASS
Backend: Regular users can read board layout - PASS
Backend: PUT /api/config/board-layout/{board} requires auth - PASS (401 without auth)
Backend: PUT /api/config/board-layout/{board} returns 403 for non-admin - PASS
Backend: Admin can save board layout via PUT - PASS
Backend: Layout data persists after PUT (verified via GET) - PASS
Backend: Layout is global (regular user sees admin's layout) - PASS
Backend: Layout update replaces previous layout - PASS
Backend: Empty dict returned for nonexistent board - PASS
Backend: Can save empty column_order/hidden_columns - PASS
Backend: SCHEDULING board layout CRUD works - PASS
Frontend: Dashboard loads for admin - PASS
Frontend: Column manager button visible for admin - PASS
Frontend: Columns are draggable for admin - PASS
Frontend: Layout saved via API (200 response) - PASS
Frontend: Column order persists after page reload - PASS
Frontend: Hidden columns persist after page reload - PASS
Frontend: Column manager button hidden for regular user - PASS
Frontend: Columns NOT draggable for regular user - PASS
Frontend: Regular user sees same column order as admin set - PASS
Frontend: Regular user PUT returns 403 - PASS

issues: Existing issue from previous iterations: Hydration warnings in console - cosmetic, does not affect functionality

config.py (lines 118-138).GET_endpoint: GET /api/config/board-layout/{board_name} correctly requires auth and returns layout from board_layouts collection
config.py (lines 118-138).PUT_endpoint: PUT /api/config/board-layout/{board_name} correctly requires admin role and upserts layout
config.py (lines 118-138).schema: Layout stored with board, column_order, hidden_columns, and updated_at fields

Dashboard.js (lines 155-190).load_layout: useEffect loads layout from /api/config/board-layout/{currentBoard} on board change
Dashboard.js (lines 155-190).auto_save: useEffect with 800ms debounce saves layout when admin modifies boardColumnOrders or hiddenColumns
Dashboard.js (lines 155-190).guard: layoutLoaded ref prevents redundant loads and layoutInitRef prevents initial save

seed_data_creation: Created admin and viewer user sessions via MongoDB for testing. Test layout saved to TEST_LAYOUT_BOARD and SCHEDULING boards. All test data cleaned up after tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Board layout persistence feature working correctly. GET /api/config/board-layout/{board} returns layout, PUT requires admin. Frontend loads layout on board change and auto-saves with 800ms debounce when admin modifies columns. Layout is stored in board_layouts collection with schema {board, column_order, hidden_columns, updated_at}. Regular users see the same layout but cannot modify.
